name: vectron
description: Interactive Structural Code Intelligence & Safe Refactor Simulation

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npm install --include=dev --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server
